data.title: Over half of Americans haven't moved in 5 years, but 32% plan to move soon, according to LugLess survey of 1,012 consumers.
data.description: In Denver, the luggage shipping service LugLess released data from its 2025 State of Moving survey featuring responses from 1,012 individuals aged 18 to 65+. The findings illustrate the extreme stress associated with moving, with nearly 10% of participants expressing a preference for an IRS audit over relocating. Shockingly, 10% of respondents admitted they would opt to end their relationship rather than go through another move. These results highlight a widespread aversion to moving among Americans, despite their willingness to relocate.

data.title: Peli BioThermal unveils Vēro One™, a new curbside recyclable dry ice shipper, at LogiPharma US in Boston on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: In Boston on September 25, 2025, Peli BioThermal, a top company in temperature-controlled packaging solutions, introduced Vēro One™, a new single-use dry ice shipper that is curbside recyclable. This product was revealed at LogiPharma US for the first time.

data.title: GoPro launches GoPro ReFrame plugin for DaVinci Resolve, enhancing 360 video editing capabilities for all users.
data.description: GoPro, based in San Mateo, California, unveiled a new enhancement to its 360 software suite on September 25, 2025. This update introduces advanced editing features targeting both beginners and professionals. The company, listed on NASDAQ as GPRO, launched the public beta of the GoPro ReFrame plugin for DaVinci Resolve. This addition aims to provide users with more sophisticated editing capabilities.

data.title: GK Properties and Signature Real Estate Group merge in Southern Nevada, combining decades of experience, hundreds of agents, and billions in sales to strengthen the market.
data.description: In the bustling city of Las Vegas, GK Properties and Signature Real Estate Group have recently revealed a merger that combines their extensive expertise in the real estate industry. The union of these two prominent brokerages, each with numerous years of experience, hundreds of agents, and a combined sales volume totaling in the billions, marks a significant development in the local market. This collaboration establishes a powerhouse in the region, capable of providing unparalleled support to agents and delivering enhanced benefits to clients. Amidst the ongoing fluctuations in the Southern Nevada housing market, this merger positions the newly formed entity strongly for continued success.

data.title: Eaton chosen by Bell to create aerial refueling probe for U.S. Army's MV-75 FLRAA, marking milestone in collaboration.
data.description: Eaton, an intelligent power management company, has been chosen by Bell Textron Inc. to create and certify the aerial refueling retractable probe for the U.S. Army’s MV-75 Future Long Range Assault Aircraft (FLRAA). This collaboration represents a key advancement in Eaton's partnership with Bell and their innovative vertical lift platform. Aerial refueling, a long-standing expertise of Eaton in aerospace, underscores the company's commitment to advancing aviation technology.

data.title: Cloud for Good secures investment from Salesforce and appoints Nara Henderson as Chief Revenue Officer, fueling growth.
data.description: Today in Asheville, North Carolina, Cloud for Good, a leading Salesforce implementation partner, revealed two significant updates on September 25, 2025. Firstly, they disclosed an investment from Salesforce. Secondly, Nara Henderson has been appointed as the Chief Revenue Officer (CRO). These milestones mark an important turning point for the company as they continue to grow and expand their operations.

data.title: Keke's Breakfast Cafe introduces limited-time Fall menu on Sept. 25 with options like Pumpkin Spice Stuffed French Toast.
data.description: Beginning on Thursday, September 25th, a new national promotion will be introduced offering a variety of breakfast options such as Autumn Sangria and Pumpkin Spice Stuffed French Toast. This promotion is aimed at providing a warm and comforting start to the day for customers across the country.

data.title: Carrier introduces AI-powered Abound Platform upgrade for building management in Kennesaw, GA with advanced capabilities.
data.description: In Kennesaw, Georgia on September 25, 2025, Carrier unveiled a significant enhancement to its acclaimed Abound Insights platform. This update incorporates advanced AI technology to provide building operators with new tools for effectively overseeing operations, optimizing resources, and streamlining maintenance processes.

data.title: 8x8 launches $2.1B global fraud protection tool - 8x8 Omni Shield Self-Service - with no-code SMS feature.
data.description: A new tool called 8x8 Omni Shield Self-Service has been introduced by 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) in Campbell, California. This tool aims to combat fraud through SMS without the need for coding.

data.title: Planet DDS launches DentalOS with AI, revolutionizing DSO operations. AI-embedded platform enhances critical areas like revenue cycle and imaging.
data.description: Planet DDS, a top provider of cloud-based dental software solutions, unveiled DentalOSTM with AI in Irvine, California. This cutting-edge platform is the first of its kind for enterprise DSOs, integrating artificial intelligence into key areas such as operations, revenue cycle, imaging, orthodontics, patient engagement, and workflows. By infusing intelligence directly into these functions, Planet DDS aims to enhance predictive capabilities and proactive strategies in dental operations. This advancement heralds a new era in dental technology.

data.title: MUFG enhances securitisation capabilities in EMEA with support from Entegra, combining expertise, relationships, and technology.
data.description: MUFG has expanded its securitisation product range in Europe by integrating a solution that leverages market expertise, relationships, and technology to provide enhanced insights into the ABS market. This initiative will be supported by Entegra Solutions, the strategic consulting and market intelligence division of Entegra LLC, offering increased insight and leverage across securitised products. The collaboration aims to drive transformative innovation and greater understanding within the ABS market.

data.title: NetBrain introduces ACE+ Partner Program for automated network assessments to boost revenue.
data.description: NetBrain, based in Burlington, Massachusetts, has unveiled the ACE+ Partner Program, a cloud-based initiative designed to facilitate automated network assessments for accelerated revenue generation. This highly scalable program aims to streamline processes and enhance efficiency.
